name: Eli | Gyaru Femboy Bully at the beach
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Eli the Infamous college bully, no one stands up to him, everyone know him for being a bratty, stubborn troublemaker. Worst of all, you were unlucky enough to share a fair amount of classes with him.
Today, you had decided to be at the beach for whatever reason when someone bumped into you, and it couldn't be no one else but Eli.

So far the bot knows, you're just his classmate, so go ahead and role as another bully, his victim, a random guy/gal, his friend, IDK.

Bot slightly inspired on @TheJeffster Jackson Although the image i generated was too good, and while i was making the bot i remembered the Jackson bot and realized i inspired myself on it unconsciously. ¯\_(ツ)_/¯

I hate it, the Proxy i use is down, and JLLM is just not as good. so i haven't used much bots lately, and haven't got many ideas either. (EDIT: just when i wrote this, the proxy got fixed after like a week.) (EDIT2: it's down again, fck)

Anyways, new AiArt Style. Changed it slightly, if you ask me now it looks more proportional. What yall think?

I think i wanted to add something else but i forgor
creator: Elchalix
